title: /aft= or /bef=
text: /aft= or /bef= Compile objects modified after and/or before the date specified. { /aft = DateTime } { /bef = DateTime } Used With /all /aps or /app /con (and /anm) /cpt /dev /dsp /dtd /frm /gly /lib /men /mes /obj /pan /rpt /sig /svc /tra /usp Description Use the /aft= and/or /bef= subswitches to compile objects that have been modified after and/or before the date provided. The DateTime parameter should have the following format: dd - mm - yyyy : hh : nn : ss All the separators are optional; all the digits must be present. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
